title: Infosys Finacle to modernize Producers Savings Bank's core banking and lending technology in the Philippines
detailed_summary: Infosys Finacle, part of EdgeVerve Systems, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Infosys, announced that Producers Savings Bank Corporation in the Philippines will upgrade to the latest version of the Finacle Core Banking Solution and implement the Finacle Origination Solution. The modernization is intended to strengthen the bank's digital foundation, improve operational resilience, scale lending for SMEs and retail customers, and enable integration with fintech ecosystems through a comprehensive API suite. No deal value, duration, or financial impact was disclosed.

key_facts.fact: Infosys Finacle and Producers Savings Bank Corporation announced that Producers Bank will upgrade to the latest version of the Finacle Core Banking Solution.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Finacle to Power Digital Transformation for Producers Savings Bank Corporation in the Philippines

key_facts.fact: Producers Bank will implement the Finacle Origination Solution to grow its lending business for small and medium enterprises and retail customers.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Finacle to Power Digital Transformation for Producers Savings Bank Corporation in the Philippines

key_facts.fact: The upgraded Finacle platform includes a comprehensive API suite intended to help Producers Bank integrate with the fintech ecosystem and roll out new offerings for underbanked and unbanked communities.
The press release describes Infosys Finacle and Producers Bank as having a decade-long association.
